title: Pale Advancement
description: Adds advancements for the drop "The Garden Awakens"!
body:
## Description
In version 1.21.4, which introduced the pale garden, no advancements were initially added. "Pale Advancement" will introduce 8 new advancements related to the pale garden and the creaking. In these advancements, you will need to find, obtain, or kill, adding more objectives to this biome.
## Advancement list
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
### First
The first advancement is "Pale Advancement". To achieve it, you have to get to the pale garden.
### Second
The second advancement is "Pale Tree". To obtain it, you will need to get a pale log.
### Third
The third advancement is "Scary Creature". To complete this, you need to kill the creaking who destroyed the creaking heart.
### Fourth
The fourth advancement is "New Ore! Or Not?". To achieve this, you will need to obtain resin.
### Fifth
The fifth advancement is "I've Seen Him Somewhere". To get this, make chiseled resin bricks.
### Sixth
The sixth advancement is "He Is Strange". To complete this, find a closed eyeblossom.
### Seventh
The seventh advancement is "A Dark Tale". To achieve this, find an open eyeblossom.
### Eighth
The eighth advancement is "Scary and Beautiful". To complete this, find a pale moss carpet in the pale garden.
### Ninth
The ninth advancement is "Three eyes". To complete this, look at the creaking through the spyglass.
  
</details>
